name: NSFW Level Detector
description: Detect hidden NSFW tricks in GD levels before playing them.

auto-scan.name: Auto-Scan on Level Load
auto-scan.description: Scan automatically when entering a level

sensitivity.name: Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: Higher = more detections but more false positives

warn-threshold.name: Warn Threshold
warn-threshold.description: Show warning if any category exceeds this %
